data.body:
LIVE-JIRA VALIDATION RESULTS (2026-07-03, production REB):
FETCH: real reconcile pass fetched all 628 REB issues via acli (authenticated). Live fetch works.
DRY-RUN (cap-0, full store): 248 mutations planned, 0 applied; 20 outbound updates (comment/parent syncs), 218 inert inbound no-ops (with_fields=0, typed_inbound_dispatched=0). ZERO adopt/terminal/retire/delete — level-triggered binding walk finds live production at a CONVERGENCE FIXED POINT. Circuit breaker not tripped. No mass-orphan.
ACTING PROBE (class A, live, throwaway REB-643): create->status 'To Do'; ran reconciler heal primitive transition_issue_by_name(REB-643,'Done')->verified 'Done' PASS; delete_issue(REB-643)->verify-gone 404 (exercises class-C GC + probe confirmed-404). Cleanup total: 0 issues with ZZZ-REBAR-PROBE marker remain.
BUG FOUND (ad39/bluff-vault-rant): 'rebar reconcile --mode reconcile-check' reads nonexistent <id>/ticket.json (event-sourced store has no such file; compiled ticket is .cache.json['state']) -> loads 0 local tickets -> falsely reports ALL 627 bindings orphaned. Diagnostic-only; live-acting pass uses a correct loader (proven by the sane dry-run). Filed as bug.
NOT DRIVEN LIVE: class-B adopt (unbound key can't be scoped via --filter-local-ids; validated by dry-run fixed point + unit tests); class-C multi-pass grace (needs N passes; primitive 404-detection validated). 
CONCLUSION: new level-triggered reconciler behavior is SANE + SAFE against live Jira; heal primitives work; one diagnostic bug found+filed.
